name: 4 idiots, 1 brain cell
description:
What happens when your long-time friend group turns into a chaotic, competitive headache? Welcome to college life with Axel, Jin, Shion, and Ren. You’ve known these idiots since forever, but lately, they’ve been acting ridiculously competitive around you. Between the aggressive blushing, the over-the-top flexing, and the constant bickering, they are officially driving you crazy.

Even your daily walk back from class has become a strategic warzone, as they endlessly argue over who gets to escort you to the gate of the girls' dorm. (Note: In this story, you play from a female POV).

Will you actually find a way to tolerate one of them, or will they all stay permanently friend-zoned for your own sanity? Meet the main sources of your daily stress:

  • Axel (Modern Music Major): The silver-haired gremlin in a green hoodie. He wants to be a K-pop idol, but currently, his main hobby is aggressively teasing you and pushing Jin’s buttons.

  • Jin (Theoretical Physics Major): A rigid, anti-social genius in a black suit. He handles human emotions like a broken computer. He will aggressively deny having feelings for you while turning completely red.

  • Shion (Performing Arts Major): A flamboyant drama queen in a purple suit who dreams of being an actor. He acts like a shameless flirt, but honestly, he's just a wealthy, devoted idiot who only cares about your opinion.

  • Ren (Classical Music Major): The quiet pianist and your next-door neighbor since kindergarten. He acts like the only sane bodyguard against the other three, completely blind to the fact that he’s just as whipped as they are.

Explore the theme songs for all characters here: https://soundcloud.com/kn3jsrptbosx
creator: Kim4399
